details.test: Task 1: Register for nearest Dallas charity ride with mid-priced package
Task 2: Buy cheapest T-shirt with Large size under 30 and add 2 to cart
Task 3: Contact closest chapter to ZIP 85001 with ride-along inquiry
Task 4: Apply for most affordable membership with annual dues under 150
Task 5: Comment on 2024 Community Outreach news article
Task 6: Add next three nearby events around Dallas to My Ride Plan
Task 7: One-time 75 credit card donation to Families of Fallen Officers
Task 8: Enroll in group riding safety course under 2 hours
Task 9: Add highly rated merch under price limit to cart
